justification: Bayesian Logic Inc.'s own website documents the company and its NET-VISA seismic monitoring work under UN contract; Stuart Russell is listed as founder and Vice-President on the company site.
Trevor Darrell's UC Berkeley faculty page explicitly lists him as Founding Co-Director of Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research (BAIR).
Mila's own directory page for Yoshua Bengio names him as founder and scientific advisor of Mila – Quebec Artificial Intelligence Institute, founded in 1993.
Original October 2016 press release announcing Element AI's launch names Jean-François Gagné as CEO and co-founder alongside Yoshua Bengio and others.
Same October 2016 Element AI launch press release names Yoshua Bengio as a co-founder of Element AI alongside Jean-François Gagné.
Colorado Governor's official press release explicitly states the Colorado AI Policy Work Group was convened by Governor Polis and delivered its unanimous policy framework.
Eleos AI's own team page lists co-founders including Kyle Fish, confirming his co-founding role in the AI welfare research organization.
Recoding America Fund's about page documents the organization's leadership and Jennifer Pahlka's role as co-founder and board chair.
METR's official spin-out announcement from ARC references Paul Christiano's original role in founding ARC Evals and launching the frontier model evaluation initiative now housed at METR.
Wikipedia's Black in AI article names Timnit Gebru and Rediet Abebe as co-founders of the organization in 2017, sourced from multiple cited references.
Wikipedia's Neuralink article names Elon Musk as co-founder in 2016 alongside the founding team of eight scientists and engineers.
Wikipedia's Liang Wenfeng article confirms he founded High-Flyer AI in 2019 as a subsidiary dedicated to AI algorithm research, prior to launching DeepSeek.
AI4ALL's own 'Our Story' page documents Fei-Fei Li as co-founder of the nonprofit in 2017, dedicated to increasing diversity in artificial intelligence.
Trust::Data consortium's own page for Sandy Pentland confirms his role as founder and director of the Trust::Data Alliance at MIT.
Wikipedia's Jukedeck article names Ed Newton-Rex as founder of the AI music startup, noting the company was founded in 2012 (with work beginning in 2010) and acquired by ByteDance in 2019.
